_meta.description: District-wise government office directory for GhostGov AI. Keyed by district, then by office_type. The office_type keys match the `office` array in services.json, so a service can be resolved to nearby offices with offices[district][office_type].
_meta.coverage_note: Andhra Pradesh has 26 districts as of the 2022 reorganisation. This file covers 5 for the hackathon demo. Add districts by copying any block and replacing entries.
_meta.data_source: Coordinates, addresses, phone numbers and opening hours retrieved from Google Places on 2026-07-22. Government office timings shift with local holidays and orders — treat hours as indicative and call ahead.

locators.sachivalayam: https://gramawardsachivalayam.ap.gov.in — 'Know Your Sachivalayam' lookup by village or ward
locators.meeseva_all_centres: https://ap.meeseva.gov.in — centre locator; 7,000+ centres statewide, far more than listed here
locators.psk_all: https://www.passportindia.gov.in — locate PSK/POPSK by pin code

meeseva.name: MeeSeva Center, Maddilapalem
meeseva.address: 1st Floor, 9-1-9, Kala Bharathi Road, above Suryakala Bakery, Pithapuram Colony, Maddilapalem, Visakhapatnam 530003
meeseva.hours: Mon–Sat 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM; Sun 9:00 AM – 2:00 PM

meeseva.name: Mee Seva Center, Daba Gardens
meeseva.address: D.No 33-23-10/1, Chalavathota, near SRMT, Allipuram, Daba Gardens, Visakhapatnam 530004

collectorate.name: Office of the District Collector, Visakhapatnam
collectorate.address: Main Road, Krishna Nagar, Maharani Peta, Visakhapatnam 530002
collectorate.notes: Heritage British-era campus near RK Beach. Weekly public grievance day is held here. Plenty of parking.

rto.name: RTO Office Visakhapatnam (Urban)
rto.address: Madhavadhara VUDA Colony, VUDA Layout, Marripalem, Visakhapatnam 530018
rto.notes: Handles LLR tests for Visakhapatnam Urban. Server downtime frequently delays scheduled test slots — arrive early and expect waits.

rto.name: Regional Transport Office, Gajuwaka
rto.address: D-Block, Duvvada, Auto Nagar, Gajuwaka, Visakhapatnam 530012

psk.name: Passport Seva Kendra, Visakhapatnam
psk.address: Door No 39-6-71, Botcha Square, Muralinagar, Madhavadhara, Visakhapatnam 530007
psk.notes: Listing name in the mapping data does not read as an official PSK label — confirm before showing to a user. Appointment is mandatory. Bring proper photocopies; mobile-camera printouts are rejected. Office is on the first floor; no seating downstairs for accompanying persons.

sro.name: Sub-Registrar Office, Akkayyapalem
sro.address: 2, Akkayyapalem Main Road, opposite SBI Bank, Akkayyapalem, Visakhapatnam 530016
sro.notes: Second floor, stairs only — difficult for elderly or mobility-impaired visitors. Roadside parking only.

sro.name: District Registrar Office, Visakhapatnam
sro.address: 27-4-9, Town Kotha Road, Super Bazar, Purna Market, Jagadamba Junction, Visakhapatnam 530002
sro.notes: Token system, first come first served. Very crowded on Mondays and Saturdays.

municipal.name: Greater Visakhapatnam Municipal Corporation (GVMC) Main Office
GVMC Zone 6 Office, Pendurthi (water supply, wards 69–72)
municipal.address: Near Bus Stop, Sujatha Nagar, Pendurthi, Visakhapatnam 530051
municipal.notes: Assistant Engineer, water supply — the point of contact for water tap connection issues in Zone 6.

discom.name: APEPDCL Corporate Office, Seethammadhara
discom.address: 50-27-5/1, TPT Colony, Balayya Sastri Layout, Seethammadhara, Visakhapatnam 530013

discom.name: APEPDCL Circle Office, Jagadamba Junction
discom.address: Waltair Main Road, opposite Hotel Green Park, Jagadamba Junction, Visakhapatnam 530002
discom.notes: District headquarters for APEPDCL Visakhapatnam; also houses two Divisional Engineer offices.

meeseva.name: MeeSeva / e-Seva Centre, Auto Nagar
meeseva.address: Shop No 2, Ground Floor, Kasiwisweswar Bhavan, Auto Nagar 100 Feet Road, beside DTDC Couriers, Auto Nagar, Vijayawada 520007
meeseva.notes: Also handles RTA/RTO online work, Jeevan Praman life certificates, PAN, voter ID and lost-article police complaints.

meeseva.name: Mee Seva Centre, KG Market (Tarapet)
meeseva.address: e-Seva Centre, 1st Floor, KG Market Complex, Kaleswara Rao Market Road, Tarapet, Vijayawada 520001
meeseva.notes: Recent visitor reports suggest this centre may have relocated or closed, and that Aadhaar services are redirected to a nearby post office. Call before travelling.

rto.name: RTA Vijayawada
rto.notes: Main LLR test centre for Vijayawada and surrounding mandals. Road-safety awareness modules are completed before the test, then scrutiny, then the exam hall.

psk.name: Passport Seva Kendra, Vijayawada
psk.address: Hotel Midcity Building, D.No 38-8-45, MG Road, Punammathota, Labbipet, Vijayawada 520010
psk.hours: Mon–Fri 9:00 AM – 1:30 PM and 2:00 – 5:30 PM; Sat–Sun closed
psk.notes: Three levels of document verification. Allow two hours or more. Carry originals plus one full set of proper photocopies.

sro.name: Sub-Registrar Office, Patamata
sro.address: D.No 40-9-50, Kala Nagar, Patamata, Benz Circle, Vijayawada 520010
sro.notes: Busiest SRO in Vijayawada. Four-wheeler parking is very difficult. Walkable from Benz Circle.

meeseva.name: V.R. MeeSeva Centre, Arundelpet
meeseva.notes: Handles Aadhaar, EC, driving licence applications and labour licences.

meeseva.name: APOnline MeeSeva & CSC Centre, Collector Office Compound
meeseva.address: Shop No 8, Registrar Office Compound, Collector Office Road, Nagarampalem, Guntur 522004
meeseva.notes: Also does Aadhaar enrolment, e-stamp non-judicial stamps, caste and income certificates, ration card changes and voter ID. Aadhaar operator availability is irregular — call ahead.

collectorate.name: District Collectorate, Guntur
collectorate.address: Collector Office Road, Ankamma Nagar, Nagarampalem, Guntur 522004

collectorate.name: Special Deputy Collector Office, Unit III

rto.name: RTO / RTA Guntur
rto.address: JKC College Road, Swarnabharathi Nagar, Peda Palakaluru, Guntur 522006
rto.notes: For the driving test bring your helmet, appointment letter and Aadhaar. Slots often start about an hour late.

sro.name: Sub-Registrar Office, Koritepadu
sro.notes: Narrow street with no parking. Book a registration slot in advance; heavy crowds on some days.

municipal.name: Guntur Municipal Corporation (GMC)
municipal.address: Grand Trunk Road, opposite Gandhi Park, Lalapet, Guntur 522003
municipal.hours: Mon–Sat 10:30 AM – 5:30 PM; lunch 1:00 – 2:30 PM; Sun closed
municipal.notes: Birth certificate and name-inclusion applications are processed here.

meeseva.name: Tirupati Mee Seva
meeseva.address: P.K. Street, beside Head Post Office, Mallaiah Gunta Katta, Tata Nagar, Tirupati 517501
meeseva.hours: Mon–Sat 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM and 3:30 – 8:00 PM; Sun closed

meeseva.name: Mee Seva Centre, NCBN Colony
meeseva.notes: Multiple reports of overcharging for Aadhaar updates. UIDAI-published rates are far lower than what is often demanded — know the official rate before paying.

collectorate.name: District Collectorate, Tirupati
collectorate.notes: Large campus housing most district-level offices with lift access. Ask at the entrance for department directions — first-time visitors routinely get lost.

rto.name: Regional Transport Office, Tirupati District
rto.address: Karakambadi Road, opposite RTO Office, Mangalam, Tirupati 517509
rto.notes: A MeeSeva counter and photocopy facility operate beside the office. A test vehicle for the trial run is available nearby.

psk.name: Passport Seva Kendra, Tirupati
psk.address: Ground and First Floor, KVC Arcade, 13-1 RC Road, Vani Nagar, Avilala, Tirupati 517501
psk.notes: Photocopy facility is available inside. Carry coins or small cash — the internal photocopy counter often has no UPI.

sro.name: District Registrar and Sub-Registrar Office, Tirupati
sro.address: 340, opposite TUDA (Urban Development Authority), Tata Nagar, Tirupati 517501
sro.notes: No ramp access and steps only. Reviewers report heavy reliance on document writers and middlemen — insist on dealing at the counter directly and escalate to the District Registrar if obstructed.

municipal.name: Tirupati Municipal Corporation (TMC)
municipal.address: Alipiri Road, Srinivasa Nagar, near Sri Padmavati Mahila Visvavidyalayam, Tirupati 517507
municipal.notes: Birth and death certificates are issued here; CRS server outages are a recurring cause of delay.

meeseva.name: MeeSeva Centre, Santhacheruvu
meeseva.address: 20-13-26, GPR Traders, Santhacheruvu Centre, opposite Seerath Committee, Suryanarayana Puram, Kakinada 533001
meeseva.notes: Highest-rated centre in Kakinada for online applications. Two-wheeler access only — no car access.

meeseva.name: MeeSeva Centre, Bhanugudi Junction
meeseva.notes: Aadhaar, voter ID, PAN, e-Shram, driving licence slot booking, pension and Aadhaar-linked banking. Aadhaar update turnaround here is reported as slow.

collectorate.name: District Collectorate, Kakinada
collectorate.address: Collector Office, Rama Rao Peta, Kakinada 533004
collectorate.notes: Neoclassical building dating from 1906. The District Collector's chamber is within the same compound.

rto.name: RTA East Godavari — Kakinada
rto.address: RTO Office Road, Krishna Nagar, Ranga Rao Nagar, Ramanayyapeta, Kakinada 533003
rto.hours: Standard government hours; confirm before travelling
rto.notes: LLR test slots are often delayed past the stated time due to server issues. Heavy crowds.

psk.name: Passport Seva Kendra, Kakinada (POPSK)
psk.address: Main Road, Rama Rao Peta, Kakinada 533001
psk.notes: Post Office Passport Seva Kendra — small facility with limited staff and no separate waiting hall. Budget extra time compared to the Visakhapatnam PSK.

sro.name: Sub-Registrar Office, Sarpavaram / Ramanayyapeta
sro.notes: No lift; stairs are congested. Parking is difficult.

municipal.name: Kakinada Municipal Corporation (Annex)
municipal.address: 65-13-7, Mehar Nagar, Dwaraka Nagar, Suryaraopeta, Kakinada 533003
municipal.hours: Mon–Fri 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM; Sat 6:00 AM – 12:00 PM; Sun closed
